source.file: TK_marker at middle items on the track.lua
TK_marker at start items on the track.lua

version.author: TouristKiller
version.changelog: + v1.0.1: Use dedicated module file (TKFXBPatchbay_Standalone.lua) to prevent ReaPack conflict with TK FX BROWSER + Initial public release - fully-featured standalone Patchbay viewer

version.author: TouristKiller
version.changelog: + Initial release - Toggle FX Browser window visibility while keeping it running in background

reapack.name: TK_FX_BROWSER_Mini_TOGGLE_VISIBILITY.lua
reapack.desc: TK FX BROWSER Mini - Toggle Visibility

version.author: TouristKiller
version.changelog: + Initial release - Toggle FX Browser Mini window visibility while keeping it running in background

reapack.name: TK_FX_BROWSER_TOGGLE_BOTH.lua
reapack.desc: TK FX BROWSER - Toggle Both (Main + Mini)

version.author: TouristKiller
version.changelog: + Initial release - Toggle visibility of both TK FX BROWSER and Mini windows simultaneously

reapack.name: TK_FX_BROWSER_TOGGLE_SCREENSHOT_WINDOW.lua
reapack.desc: TK FX BROWSER - Toggle Screenshot Window

version.author: TouristKiller
version.changelog: + Initial release - Toggle Screenshot Window panel via ExtState (works as global shortcut)

version.author: TouristKiller
version.changelog: + Initial release - Force show FX Browser window (fallback script)

version.author: TouristKiller
version.changelog: + Initial release - Redirects REAPER's native FX browser to an alternative script of your choice (e.g. TK FX Browser).

reapack.name: TK_Native_FX_Browser_Redirect_Settings.lua
reapack.desc: TK Native FX Browser Redirect - Settings

version.author: TouristKiller
version.changelog: + Initial release - Configuration window for TK Native FX Browser Redirect (presets, custom paths, monitor toggle).

reapack.name: TK_Slot_Machine.lua
reapack.desc: TK Slot Machine - FX Slots Manager

version.author: TouristKiller
version.changelog: + Initial release

version.author: TouristKiller
version.changelog: ++ INITIAL RELEASE FOR TESTING

version.author: TouristKiller
version.changelog: + Choose a slot number (no focus needed) and replace across selected or all tracks.

reapack.name: TK_Add_ReVue_to_Tracks.lua
reapack.desc: TK Add ReVue VU Meter to Selected Tracks (MCP Embedded)

version.author: TouristKiller
version.changelog: + v1.1: Improved timing with extra defer cycles and verification for reliable MCP embedding + Initial release

reapack.name: TK_Add_ReVue_to_Tracks_Chunk.lua
reapack.desc: TK Add ReVue VU Meter to Selected Tracks (MCP Embedded) - Chunk Version

version.author: TouristKiller
version.changelog: + Initial release - Chunk-based embedding (faster and more reliable)

reapack.name: TK_Create_Tracks_with_ReVue.lua
reapack.desc: TK Create New Track(s) with ReVue VU Meter (MCP Embedded)

version.author: TouristKiller
version.changelog: + v1.1: Improved timing with extra defer cycles and verification for reliable MCP embedding + Initial release

reapack.name: TK_Create_Tracks_with_ReVue_Chunk.lua
reapack.desc: TK Create New Track(s) with ReVue VU Meter (MCP Embedded) - Chunk Version

version.author: TouristKiller
version.changelog: + Initial release - Chunk-based embedding (faster and more reliable)

version.author: TouristKiller
version.changelog:
v1.9.7: + Removed: MIXER (this is now a standalone script - TK_Mixer)
v1.9.6: + Fixed: Tempo drag not working on macOS (replaced JS_Mouse_SetPosition cursor-warp logic with ImGui_GetMouseDragDelta, which avoids the Cocoa mouse event suppression after CGWarpMouseCursorPosition)
v1.9.4: + Added: Configurable transport button order (reorder via up/down arrows in settings) + Added: Optional button background for transport buttons (color, hover, active, padding, rounding, border) + Added: Separate icon color setting for graphic transport buttons + Added: Extra width (horizontal padding) control for transport button backgrounds + Fixed: Arrow icons (rewind/forward) now properly centered within button area + Fixed: Equal spacing between transport buttons when background is enabled + Refactored: Graphic and text mode rendering now use a single data-driven loop

version.author: TouristKiller
version.changelog: + Configurable track name prefix (enable/disable and custom text) + External toggle scripts for toolbar buttons with sync support + Toolbar buttons reflect current state when toggled via checkbox or script

version.author: TouristKiller
version.changelog: v0.8.1: + External toggle scripts for toolbar buttons with sync support + Toolbar buttons reflect current state when toggled via checkbox or script v0.8.0: + New option "Use Selected Track for Audio" in Settings: routes audio preview through the currently selected track so track FX, volume, pan and sends are applied to the preview + Falls back to hardware output when no track is selected + Cartridge sampler integration: right-click an audio file -> "Add to new track with Cartridge" or "Load sample to focused Cartridge" (active waveform selection is applied as trim) + Pitch detection: real-time tunable stability/update/sensitivity sliders + Fast/Balanced/Smooth presets in Settings + Stability: fixed ImGui_EndChild assertion crash that could occur on view-mode switches (gear/shortcuts buttons) + Collections and Saved Searches now support 3 levels: Group / Subgroup / Sub-subgroup + Header context menu: "New sub-subgroup..." on a subgroup, full rename/move/delete on a sub-subgroup + Save Search dialog: extra "Sub-subgroup (optional)" field + Item context menu: "Move to sub-subgroup" submenu + Color picker: "Use gradient" (group + subgroup) and "Inherit parent color" (subgroup + sub-subgroup) + Saved searches inherit the effective color of their (sub-)subgroup, including gradient + Empty subgroups now stay visible after creation

reapack.name: TK_MediaExplorer_WebBridge.lua
reapack.desc: TK Media Explorer Web Controller - Bridge Script

version.author: TouristKiller
version.changelog: v1.7: HTML now embedded in script and auto-installed to reaper_www_root + Control Media Explorer from smartphone/web browser + HTML interface automatically installed on first run + Updates overwrite existing HTML to ensure latest version + Play/Stop, Random, Repeat controls + Navigate folders and files with arrow keys + Volume control + Display current file, folder path, and selected item + Requires js_ReaScriptAPI extension and REAPER web server enabled

reapack.name: TK_MediaExplorer_WebBridge_CrossPlatform.lua
reapack.desc: TK Media Explorer Web Controller - Cross-Platform Test

version.name: 3.1-beta
version.author: TouristKiller
version.changelog: v3.1-beta: Cross-platform compatibility test version + Flexible class name detection for ListView/TreeView (SWELL compatibility for macOS/Linux) + Added Unix/macOS path detection (paths starting with /) + OS info logged to console on startup + BETA: Testers on macOS/Linux needed to verify SWELL compatibility

reapack.name: TK_ChordGun.lua
reapack.desc: TK ChordGun - Enhanced chord generator with scale filter/remap and chord recognition

version.author: TouristKiller (based on pandabot ChordGun)
version.changelog:
2.5.5 [Strum] + Bug fix — strum offset is now correctly applied when inserting via Shift+Click (PPQ-per-beat was mis-calculated) + Tempo-independent — strum delay (ms) now scales with project BPM so the feel stays consistent across tempos + Combined right-click popup menu with submenus and check-marks (Speed Mode, Delay ms presets + Custom, Grid 1/8-1/64, Velocity Curve off/up/down/v/^, Ramp Amount presets + Custom) — no separate Ctrl modifier + Velocity ramp curves applied to both inserted notes and live preview playback (scale chord, slot, progression incl. repeats and next-slot)
[Velocity] + Default Velocity: New global velocity setting via "Vel:" button in top frame next to Oct:/Inv:. Left-click cycles presets, right-click opens menu (Follow MIDI Editor / 16 / 32 / 48 / 64 / 80 / 96 / 112 / 127 / Custom). Persists between sessions. + Per-Slot Velocity: New "V" button on the left side of each progression slot opens a velocity panel with a theme-styled slider (1-127) overriding the global Vel: for that slot. Click "x" to reset to follow global. Persists with progression presets.
[Time Selection / Insert] + Cursor now snaps to start of time selection if it lies outside, so Shift+Click always inserts at the selection start + When no time selection is active, length now falls back to MIDI Editor grid (was: very short / 2 sec on new items) + New MIDI items are now created at the start of the time selection (was: created from the edit cursor, which placed notes outside or in the middle of the new item) + New item length now exactly matches the time selection (1-bar minimum no longer applied in this mode) + Newly created MIDI items are now always at least 1 bar (was: 1/2 was too short, shorter lengths jumped to 1 bar inconsistently) + Edit cursor only wraps back to time-selection start when Note Length is set to "Time Selection". With fixed note lengths the cursor now keeps moving forward through the item even if a time selection happens to be active.
[Chord Recognition] + Added recognition for 6, m6, add9, madd9, 9, 6/9, 11, min11, maj11, 13, min13, maj13 + Fixed maj13 / 13 patterns to omit the (avoid-note) 11th — Cmaj13 played as C E G B D A is now correctly recognized as Cmaj13 instead of C6 + Scoring now favors longer/exact patterns so e.g. Cmaj7 no longer mis-recognizes as C6 when both have the same number of matched notes + Partial-match recognition: notes may now be omitted from a voicing (1 missing for 4-note chords, 2 for 5+ note chords) — e.g. Cmaj13 without the 9 is still recognized as Cmaj13 instead of Am9/C + Core-interval check ensures root, 3rd and 7th are present before scoring — prevents nonsense matches on partial voicings + Recognition patterns are now derived from the central chord data table (single source of truth) — no more drift between insert and recognize + Fixed Dm9 / C9 / G9 etc. inserting as plain min7 / dom7 — chord data patterns were missing the 9 + Fixed 11, min11, 13, maj13, min13, maj#11 chord data patterns that were missing the 9 (and 11 in min13) + Added madd9 and maj11 to the chord data table (were only in the recognizer before)
[Monitor] + Chord/Note display now shows the current octave of the played note(s) as an "Oct: N" indicator centered directly below the chord/note name in the monitor window — useful for live monitoring with controllers like the Launchpad. The octave reflects the lowest currently-held note.
[Inversion] + Ctrl+Click on chord button cycles inversion (root → 1st → 2nd → 3rd → root) with visual badge "I1/I2/I3" in top-right corner. Cycle resets after 2 seconds of no Ctrl+Click on the same button. + Ctrl+Shift+Click inserts the chord using the current cycle inversion (does NOT advance the cycle, so the badge value is what gets inserted) + Ctrl+Alt+Click adds the chord to the selected progression slot using the current cycle inversion (does NOT advance the cycle)
[Tooltips] + Tooltips now support multi-line text and are clamped within the window so they no longer extend off-screen + Chord-button tooltip rewritten as multi-line list of all click actions
[UI] + Note Length dropdown now has visible "Note length" label and is wider so "Time selection" fits + Chord Style dropdown widened so all entries are readable + Inversion moved to top frame next to Octave (compact "Inv:" / "Oct:" labels) to free space on the chord-name row + Chord-name display right-aligned and uses full available width to the right of the dropdowns + Top button row shifted slightly left for tighter alignment + Removed redundant "Scale:" label from top frame to free space for the new Velocity button
[Drag & Drop] + Chord buttons can now be dragged onto progression slots (alternative to Alt+Click). A ghost label follows the cursor and the target slot highlights while dragging.
[Persistence] + "Always on Top" and "Tooltips" toggles are now remembered between sessions (saved globally) + Preset Loading: Out-of-range scale/chord indices in old preset files are clamped to valid values
[Crash Fixes] + Sparse table.concat crash when switching scales (e.g. Pentatonic > Blues) — ProjExtState tables are now self-healing + "MediaItem_Take expected" after deleting an item and using Shift+Click — take pointers now validated via ValidatePtr + GetMediaItemTake_Item + TakeIsMIDI + Shift+Click insert no longer fails with "attempt to index nil" — `playOrInsertScaleChord` now correctly resolves the selected scale note and chord type before use
[State Management] + Chord button highlight no longer stays "stuck" on the slot-chord after Ctrl+Alt+Click → slot select → chord click — `currentlyPlayingChord` is now cleared on every chord-button press + New central `resetTransientState()` clears playback overlays (currentlyPlayingChord, slot velocity override, voice-leading reference, drag state, inversion cycle) on stop, slot remove, scale change and progression clear — prevents stale state from leaking between actions

source.file: TK_ChordGun/TK_ChordGun stop all notes from playing.lua

reapack.name: TK_Find Similar MIDI Items.lua
reapack.desc: TK Find Similar MIDI Items - Find matching MIDI patterns

version.author: TouristKiller
version.changelog: + Initial release + Find MIDI items similar to reference item + Percentage-based similarity threshold + Overlay comparison with detailed statistics + Color coding by similarity percentage + Select, color, and delete similar items + Added pattern matching with offset detection + Can now find similar patterns even if notes are shifted in time + Added segment matching - find partial matches within larger items + Search modes: Full Item / Segment (find reference pattern in larger items) + Added Time Selection mode - use time selection within item as search pattern + Fixed segment matching - extra notes in matched section now reduce similarity score + Added Note Range Filter (ignore keyswitches) + Added "Pin to Top" option for created tracks + Added "Max Similarity" threshold + Added global settings persistence (Save/Load options) + Added "Show Reference" button + Improved UI with tooltips and collapsible options + Matches are now grouped by source track when copying + Added Track Batch Mode: Select a track (without selecting items) to scan all items on that track + Results are now grouped by Reference Item in Batch Mode + UI Overhaul: Compact layout, collapsible settings, improved button organization + Improved Sorting: Fixed sorting for items with identical similarity scores (Track # priority) + Workflow: Single-click details for single matches, auto-reselect reference after replace + Fix: "Replace Phrase" now correctly handles time selections with leading silence + Fix: Multi-match items now sort based on their best match + Added Track Selector popup - easily select which tracks to search + Track selector shows track number, name and color + Search/filter tracks by name in the popup + Select All / Deselect All / Invert buttons for quick selection + Only tracks containing MIDI items are shown + Added progress indicator during analysis - UI no longer freezes + Added "Lock" checkbox in Track Batch mode to lock the reference track

version.author: TouristKiller
version.changelog:
v1.8.9: + Labels Toggle: Excluded overlay grid from toggle
v1.8.8: + Added TK_Trackname_Labels_Toggle.lua - toggle all labels/text/icons/borders on/off while keeping track colors + Added hide_all_labels setting for clean edit mode + Fixed info line overlapping with track icon on same side + Arm/Solo/Mute indicator dots now respect text_opacity
v1.8.7: + Freeze Icon: Added optional free positioning mode + Freeze Icon: Can now be dragged freely over the entire track including TCP area + Freeze Icon: Lock/Unlock button to fix position after dragging + Freeze Icon: Reset button to return to default position
v1.8.5: + Added Freeze Icon feature - displays freeze icon on frozen tracks + Setting to enable/disable freeze icon in Icons tab + Freeze icon correctly positions next to parent label and info line
v1.8.3: + Fixed tcp icon sync
v1.8.2: + Fixed standalone toggle script not working for turning overlay OFF + Overlay now properly clears when toggled off via external script
v1.8.1: + Added TK_Trackname_Overlay_Toggle.lua script for toolbar/shortcut integration + Fixed icon grid column calculation for better fitting in window + Fixed nil error for track_icons_subfolders on first run
v1.8.0: + Icons tab: Added REAPER Track Icons folder as browse source with subfolder dropdown + Icons tab: Added "Use TCP Icons" option - TCP icons take priority and sync to overlay + Icons tab: Added "Sync TCP" button to synchronize overlay icons with TCP icons + Icons tab: Renamed browse modes to "Toolbar", "Track Icons", "Custom" + Fixed icon browser image caching to prevent excessive resource creation + Fixed icon grid last column going off-screen + Added Overlay Toggle button (O/X) next to Settings button for quick hide/show + Overlay can now be quickly disabled for external drag & drop operations
v1.7.3: + corrected an oepsy ;o)
v1.7.2: + New Time Selection tab with integration for TK_time selection loop color script + Overlay Grid: Added Adaptive grid division mode (zooms with arrange view) + Overlay Grid: Added "Avoid Items" option to hide grid lines behind items + Overlay Grid: Added 1/16 and 1/32 subdivisions + Performance optimizations for Settings window + Track Visibility list uses cached ListClipper for virtual scrolling
v1.7.1: + Added audio, MIDI, bus, folder track type filters to Icons tab
v1.7.0: + Icons tab: New built-in folder browser (replaces native OS dialog) + Icons tab: Quick access buttons for Pictures, Downloads, Documents folders + Icons tab: Drive selection buttons for Windows + Folder browser always opens on top (fixes z-order issues)

reapack.name: TK_Set selected MIDI item shape and view.lua
reapack.desc: TK_Set selected MIDI item shape and view

version.author: TouristKiller
version.changelog: + View, shape and grid can now be set per track or per take

version.author: TouristKiller
version.changelog: + testing

version.author: TouristKiller
version.changelog: + Initial release + English UI labels + Grid color support per preset

reapack.name: TK_Add_Send_To_Selected_Tracks.lua
reapack.desc: TK Add Send To Selected Tracks

version.author: TouristKiller
version.changelog: + Popup menu with existing send destinations from current project + Sorted by usage (most used first) + Adds send to all selected tracks, skips duplicates

reapack.name: TK_Play_And_Stop_MediaExplorer.lua
reapack.desc: Play/Stop Transport and Stop Media Explorer Preview
